title: High stakes battle in Kanti as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Kanti. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Kanti
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Kanti assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: Women voters of Kanti demand better primary healthcare and clean water

title: Economic survey reports positive growth in Kanti assembly segment
snippet_text: Local growth indicators and agricultural trade volumes in Kanti show upward trends, becoming a talking point for local candidates.

title: Political rally in Kanti draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Kanti promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Kanti
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Kanti assembly segment.

title: Flood protection works in Kanti inspected by state cabinet delegation
snippet_text: With local embankments requiring urgent reinforcements, the local flood relief work has become a major talking point in Kanti.

snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Kanti constituency.
